{{Item
| image = Dog gift costume.png
| id = dog_gift_costume
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
| Description = Best gift for any occasion! Craft with Paper to add a Secondary color
}}'''Bowtie''' is a dyable equipable accessory that's perfect for celebrating special occasions and adding a touch of cheer.

== Obtaining ==

=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|[[Bowtie]]
+ Paper
|[[File:Dog gift costume crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==

* It was added to DTN 1.18.39.[[File:Bowtie_demo2.png|thumb|428x428px|Festive Doggos!]]
